a:r.a:t: The HP Store Affiliate Program delivered mixed results in Dec 2025 – Mar 2026. While AOV grew +11.1% to £441.26 and conversion rate improved +9.6%, total sales declined -12.0% YoY driven by a -19.7% reduction in click volume. Total order value decreased -2.2% to £24,076,021. Full KPI breakdown follows on the next slides.
